case_title: FELIX DUANE M VS WONGS AUTO REPAIR

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONGS AUTO REPAIR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY FELIX DUANE M AS TO DEFENDANT WONGS AUTO REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-31-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FELIX DUANE M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONGS AUTO REPAIR $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $325.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
